name_cn:
⚠️Thick fabric with thick stitching Medium [Di0r Book Tote]
Most people think of buying practical classic styles when consuming luxury brands 💄But a collaboration art TOTE like DIOR should be a key collection piece, full of vintage vibes 😋Carry it and you are a fashion icon ⚪It really holds a lot 😍Super spacious, feels like it can hold the whole world!
